_meta.description: Bird/exotic-pet directory + forum registry — managed by cag-directory-submission-agent + cag-nap-citation-agent
_meta.audit_note: Competitor backlink discovery (Firecrawl) on Tier-1 breeders + Tier-2 classifieds. Two competitor link patterns found: (1) BLOG-COMMENT SPAM (Silvergate — links on squash/chess/pasta blogs) — never copy; (2) LEGIT LOCAL/BUSINESS DIRECTORIES (Afro Birds Farm — Yelp/MapQuest/hub.biz/ZoomInfo/Pinterest) — this is the real gap. Several competitors are flagged as scams (petscams.com, parrotforums scam threads) — reinforces CAG trust differentiation.

directories.name: Google Business Profile
directories.notes: Top-priority local citation. Foundation for Yelp/Bing/Apple NAP consistency. Verify/claim listing first.

directories.name: Hoobly
directories.notes: Page literally titled 'Free African Grey Classifieds'. Huge AG volume. Is itself a Tier-2 competitor + an open submission target. Confirm CITES/captive-bred field on post form.

directories.name: BirdsNow
directories.notes: Confirmed free tier ('free unless you pay for ads'). Aviaries/breeders/rescues. Tier-2 competitor + submission target.

directories.name: Petzlover
directories.notes: 'Create your pet listings for free.' 60+ AG listings per metro. Strong free target.

directories.name: PetClassifieds.com
directories.notes: Dedicated /ad_category/african-grey + /parrot categories, active AG listings. Verify post cost.

directories.name: BirdBreeders.com
directories.notes: State-segmented breeder directory (TX page for C.A.Gs). Already lists Congo+Timneh breeders. Free + paid tiers — verify.

directories.name: Parrots Magazine Breeders Registry
directories.notes: Parrot-specific; page states entry is FREE. UNTAPPED — no competitor found here yet. Verified 2026-06-06.

directories.name: The Avian Exchange
directories.notes: 'Screened/verified breeders' marketplace with CAG+TAG category. Verify acceptance + cost.

directories.name: Yelp for Business
directories.notes: Afro Birds Farm is listed here. Free basic listing + trust/review signal. Strong gap for a trust-led brand like C.A.Gs.

directories.name: MapQuest (local listing)
directories.notes: Afro Birds Farm listed (Houston). Local/maps citation. Often syncs from Yelp/data aggregators.

directories.name: hub.biz
directories.notes: Afro Birds Farm has a hub.biz subdomain listing. Low-authority but free citation.

directories.name: Bing Places for Business
directories.notes: Free local citation. Pairs with Google Business Profile for NAP consistency.

directories.name: Apple Maps / Business Connect
directories.notes: Free local citation; covers Apple Maps + Siri.

directories.name: Better Business Bureau (BBB)
directories.notes: Trust/credibility directory. Free listing; accreditation is paid (needs user approval). High fit for scam-fear differentiation.

directories.name: Pinterest Business
directories.notes: Afro Birds + Silvergate both have profiles. Social citation, not a true directory; good for image-rich brand presence.

forums.name: Avian Avenue — African Grey Alley
forums.notes: Dedicated CAG/TAG sub-forum; highest-value forum. Contribute genuinely before linking.

forums.name: ParrotForums
forums.notes: Large general parrot community. NOTE: hosts active scam-reporting threads (Afro Birds Farm flagged) — C.A.Gs participating here as a documented, transparent breeder is a trust opportunity.

forums.name: r/AfricanGrey (Reddit)
forums.notes: Active subreddit. No-link culture — value is reputation + occasional helpful citation, not signature links.

not_viable.name: ParrotAlert
not_viable.reason: Lost-&-found + scam-alert site, NOT a breeder directory. Listing breeders here is off-purpose. (It runs scam-site warnings — worth MONITORING for our name, not submitting to.)

not_viable.name: Exotic Pets Avenue
not_viable.reason: WooCommerce storefront competitor (cart/track-order/product prices), not an open classifieds directory.

not_viable.name: Quality Birds Online
not_viable.reason: Storefront competitor (Add-to-Cart $1200 AG), not a directory to submit to.

not_viable.name: petscams.com
not_viable.reason: Scam-reporting database (Silvergate flagged here). MONITOR for the C.A.Gs name; never a submission target.

not_viable.name: Blog-comment link farms
not_viable.reason: Silvergate's backlinks are spam comments on unrelated blogs (squash guides, chess, pasta recipes). Black-hat — NEVER replicate. Recorded only as evidence of competitor tactics.
